exercises.title: Array Length and Sum
exercises.instructions: Given scores = [85, 92, 78, 95, 88], print the length and sum of the array.
exercises.starter_code:
let scores = [85, 92, 78, 95, 88];

// Print length and sum
exercises.hints: Use scores.length and scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0)

exercises.title: Double Each Item
exercises.instructions:
Given numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], create a new array with each number doubled.
Print the new array using JSON.stringify().
exercises.starter_code:
let numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];

// Create doubled array and print with JSON.stringify
exercises.hints: Use .map(): numbers.map(x => x * 2), then JSON.stringify the result.
